---
title: "02.1_biomarker_imput_comparision"
author: "Jagadeesh Puvvula"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
#LOD = 0.1 %<LOD = 14
dbup_new<- read_csv("~/Documents/k99_home/data/exposure_impu/imputed_exposures.csv") |>
  filter(analyte_visit == "DBuP_16W") |>
  select(c(1:3)) |> rename(result_lt_norm_sl = result) |> clean_names()

dbup_old <- read_csv("~/Documents/data/home_16w_imp/dbup_16w.csv") |>
  select(c(1,2)) |> clean_names() |> rename(result_lt = result_res) 

#join
dbup_comp <- left_join(dbup_old, dbup_new, by = "subject_id") |> 
  drop_na()

#scatter plot between old and new imputation
ggplot(dbup_comp |> filter(flg_lod == "1"), aes(x = result_lt_norm_sl, y = result_lt)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8, color = "#185fa5") +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#D85A30") 
```
